name: Motion Lines
scaffolding_intent: Shows directional speed streaks behind the entity to scaffold movement verbs and action descriptions

parameters.name: lineLength
parameters.description: Length of each motion line in pixels

correction_intent: Child described the wrong MOVEMENT or DIRECTION of an entity (e.g. said 'running' when walking, 'going left' when going right, 'sitting' when standing). A1 is strictly for locomotion errors — NOT for wrong non-movement actions like 'cooking' instead of 'packing' (use A2 for those).
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't described a MOVEMENT happening in the scene (walking, running, jumping, flying). Use A1 only for locomotion — NOT for static actions like cooking, reading, talking (use A2 for those).
